discovery.text: Vancouver heritage icon — ivy-covered 1912 building steps from English Bay Beach. Old-school charm with a legendary bar/lounge. Not 'boutique' in the trendy sense, but absolutely dripping with character. Great value at ~$113-160 CAD/night. On-site restaurant and lounge. Walk to Stanley Park in 5 min. Rating 4.3/5 (2,251 reviews). The budget-friendly character pick.
